capabilities: Ensure secure and efficient user authentication by combining credential-based methods with token issuance, leveraging AI for adaptive security prompts.

procedure.action: Compose OAuth 2.0 for token issuance and set token expiration to 15 minutes by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.
Initialize AI-driven security prompts using OpenAI's GPT-3 to challenge users with context-aware questions during login.

Invoke JWT for token encoding and ensure tokens are signed with RS256 algorithm following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

Set up a Redis cache to store active tokens and invalidate them upon logout or expiration using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Invoke HTTPS for all authentication endpoints and enforce HSTS with a max-age of 31536000 seconds.

summary: Implement secure user authentication using credentials and token issuance, integrating AI prompting for enhanced security measures.
title: Credential-Based User Authentication with Token Issuance

failureConditions: Tokens are not invalidated upon logout, leading to session hijacking.

AI prompts are too predictable, reducing security effectiveness; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Token expiration is too long, increasing risk of token theft; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
successConditions: Verify token expiration by checking if tokens are invalid after 15 minutes; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Test AI prompt variability by ensuring different prompts for the same user in different sessions; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check that HTTPS is enforced by attempting to access endpoints over HTTP and expecting failure; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
